title: System Response to External Input: The Zero-State Response
summary: This page explains the limits of the convolution integral for causal signals and uses commutativity to rewrite the zero-state response integral. It then begins Example 2.8, setting up the convolution of two causal exponentials to compute the output of an LTIC system.

figures.caption: Limits of the convolution integral with two subfigures showing shaded zero regions for x(τ) and h(t−τ) for t≥0 and t<0
